sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15967" key="*)arxilo/xeios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ἀρχιλόχειος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n15967.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">used by Archilochus,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">μέτρον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:15:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.2</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
